title: Symbiosis Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Symbiosis Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
